title: Rebecca Remembers the Soldier
description: Pages 1–5 focus on rebecca remembers the soldier, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as rebecca's bond with the one-legged toy soldier is revealed through her memories of Scarlet, while the Colosseum pulls her back into the fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: soldier- San... is going to die.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: soldier...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: He's a toy soldier... with just one leg...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A toy?

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Didn't I meet someone like that near the colosseum entrance?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This way, venerable sir.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah... that was definitely him...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: We can't leave the colosseum... so even if there's something that needs doing on the outside.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We can't do anything about it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: So you're worried that this toy guy is going to die, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I found it weirder that he was alive to begin with, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Given that you're an outsider, I didn't imagine that you'd understand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But they are the same as humans.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They become friends to the friend- less.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: and siblings for only children.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They even enter relationships with lonely singles...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Which is why I don't understand why we're not allowed to live together.

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: I... I'm the only one left from my family. But from the day my mother passed away...

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: I was raised by Soldier- San... to me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He's no less than a real parent....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Ehhh... that guy ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Thank you for waiting patiently. The new ring is now in place!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Rebecca, your match is gonna start!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: ...Yeah.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Eh... what exactly are you doing, Lucy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: ...well these two solo-lunch- boxes fell on the floor during our little fight, before.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: In the end, I am

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Sorry... I know you spent all you had on them for me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Chomp Chomp

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Once again, we've got a fearsome lineup for you in D block!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: But even though they fell, they're still real tasty!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: You really don't look like a prisoner.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: I'll see you in the finals.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The match is about to start!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: All D-block Participants must head for the ring now!!

dialogue.speaker: Scarlet
dialogue.text: Mommy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Lookit all the flowers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Oh, Rebecca.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Thank you for helping me work.

dialogue.speaker: Scarlet
dialogue.text: Now let's go to town to sell them.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: What happened to the King!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Stop it!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The Riku Royal Fighters have set fire to the town!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The Palace... it's burning!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: What's happening in this country...!?

dialogue.speaker: Toy Soldier
dialogue.text: Run away, scarlet- Sama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Guwah!!!

summary: Rebecca Remembers the Soldier focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #5 as rebecca's bond with the one-legged toy soldier is revealed through her memories of Scarlet, while the Colosseum pulls her back into the fight.
